name: Jean Klein
bio: Jean Klein (1912–1998) was a French-born Advaita Vedanta teacher who studied in India with Pandit Veeraraghavachar and a Kashmiri yoga master. He brought a distinctly European sensibility to non-dual teaching, integrating body awareness and aesthetics with the direct approach of Advaita. His influence is seen in the work of students like Francis Lucille and Rupert Spira.
